message:
feat(search): add terminal content indexing pipeline (ft-dr6zv.1.5)

Incremental background-safe pipeline that tracks per-pane watermarks,
extracts documents via chunk_scrollback_lines + extract_command_output_blocks
+ extract_agent_artifacts, and feeds them into SearchIndex with dedup.

Includes 20 unit tests and 12 property-based tests covering state
transitions, watermark monotonicity, resize storm handling, pane limits,
and serde roundtrips.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
